feed.title: Whizan AI - Company Specific DSA Interview Roadmaps
feed.subtitle: Master Data Structures and Algorithms for the world's top tech companies.

entry.title: Google Interview Preparation Roadmap
entry.summary: Complete guide to Google's most frequently asked DSA questions and interview patterns.

entry.title: Amazon Interview Preparation Roadmap
entry.summary: Master Amazon SDE technical rounds with curated LeetCode challenges and leadership principle integration.

entry.title: Apple Interview Preparation Roadmap
entry.summary: Deep dive into Apple's technical engineering loops, focusing on resource-efficient DSA solutions.

entry.title: Meta (Facebook) Interview Preparation Roadmap
entry.summary: Excel in Meta technical interviews with a focus on speed, optimality, and product architecture.

entry.title: Microsoft Interview Preparation Roadmap
entry.summary: Prepare for Microsoft SDE roles with a vetted list of technical coding patterns and core DSA.

entry.title: Netflix Interview Preparation Roadmap
entry.summary: High-performance DSA and scalable system patterns for Netflix software engineering interviews.

entry.title: Uber Interview Preparation Roadmap
entry.summary: Master real-time logistics and routing algorithms used in Uber technical interviews.

entry.title: Twitter (X) Interview Preparation Roadmap
entry.summary: Social graph algorithms and real-time data processing patterns for Twitter technical loops.

entry.title: Adobe Interview Preparation Roadmap
entry.summary: Preparation guide for Adobe roles, focusing on multimedia processing and cloud engineering.

entry.title: Airbnb Interview Preparation Roadmap
entry.summary: Marketplace dynamics and distributed systems challenges for Airbnb software engineering rounds.

entry.title: Salesforce Interview Preparation Roadmap
entry.summary: Cloud-native architecture and CRM system technical rounds preparation for Salesforce.

entry.title: Oracle Interview Preparation Roadmap
entry.summary: Database engineering and cloud infrastructure DSA challenges for Oracle technical interviews.

entry.title: Tesla Interview Preparation Roadmap
entry.summary: Master highly optimized DSA and system efficiency for Tesla software engineering rounds.

entry.title: Spotify Interview Preparation Roadmap
entry.summary: Real-time content streaming and playlist algorithms for Spotify technical interviews.

entry.title: LinkedIn Interview Preparation Roadmap
entry.summary: Social graph data structures and professional platform engineering at LinkedIn.

entry.title: Snapchat Interview Preparation Roadmap
entry.summary: Multimedia data handling and high-concurrency loops for Snapchat engineering.

entry.title: Palantir Interview Preparation Roadmap
entry.summary: Complex data analysis algorithms and rigorous technical rounds preparation for Palantir.

entry.title: Coinbase Interview Preparation Roadmap
entry.summary: Blockchain engineering and crypto-transaction security technical rounds for Coinbase.

entry.title: Goldman Sachs Interview Preparation Roadmap
entry.summary: Financial system algorithms and high-frequency technical interview preparation for Goldman Sachs.

entry.title: JPMorgan Chase Interview Preparation Roadmap
entry.summary: Large-scale banking systems and secure software engineering rounds for JPMorgan Chase.

entry.summary: Master MySQL basics and installation for database engineering.

entry.summary: Deep dive into MySQL DDL and effective table structures.

entry.summary: Master INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE operations in MySQL.

entry.summary: Complete guide to SELECT queries and data filtering logic.

entry.summary: Master constraints, integrity, and optimized querying in MySQL.
